MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Ronald Austin is present.
Attorney M.C. Hall appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ingrid Ebeling is present.
Attorney Bao Tran Dang representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renee, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle. The trial date of April 13, 2015 remains on calendar.
